title: MetaprojectOperation
description: The single source-of-truth descriptor for a metaproject operation, projected into the harness ToolRegistry, the agent InteractiveTool set, and the MCP server (MP-3).

name.description: Stable operation name exposed to the model (e.g. graph_affected).

module.description: Owning metaproject module (facade backing the operation).

description.description: Human/model-facing summary of what the operation does.

risk.description: Risk class consumed by the policy/approval gate. Metaproject reads are 'read'.

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema for the operation input (validated before invoke).

outputSchema.description: JSON Schema for the structured operation result (may $ref a sibling schema).

backing.description: How the reference adapter serves the operation (MP-2).
